title: RC381 Inter-Provincial Calculation for CPP and QPP Contributions and Overpayments - Canada.ca
content:
## RC381 Inter-Provincial Calculation for CPP and QPP Contributions and Overpayments
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
This form is used to calculate and split your pension contributions between the CPP and the QPP. Complete this form if you earned employment income in Quebec while you were a resident of another province or territory, or if you earned employment income outside Quebec while you were a resident of Quebec.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
